name: Jeff Lorber
description: American keyboardist, composer, and record producer
abstract: Jeffrey H. Lorber (born November 4, 1952) is an American keyboardist, composer, and record producer.

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Salutes the Jazz Masters: Verve Records at 50

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: I was doing an overdub for Jeff Lorber not long ago... he sent them to me, and I heard. I think I played piccolo on one of those
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
